languages.text: Вольный Торговец настиг Тразина Неисчислимого. Пришло время вернуть украденное горделивым ксеносом.
The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец настиг Тразина Неисчислимого. Пришло время вернуть украденное горделивым ксеносом.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.
The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.
The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.
The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat Trazyn den Unendlichen gestellt. Es wird Zeit, zurückzuholen, was der hochmütige Xenos gestohlen hat.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat Trazyn den Unendlichen gestellt. Es wird Zeit, zurückzuholen, was der hochmütige Xenos gestohlen hat.

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a fini par acculer Trazyn l'Infini. Il est temps de reprendre ce qu'a volé l'arrogant xénos.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a fini par acculer Trazyn l'Infini. Il est temps de reprendre ce qu'a volé l'arrogant xénos.

languages.text: 行商浪人终于将无限者特拉金逼入了绝境。是时候夺回那傲慢异形偷走的东西了。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人终于将无限者特拉金逼入了绝境。是时候夺回那傲慢异形偷走的东西了。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha acorralado a Trazyn el Infinito. Es hora de recuperar lo que el orgulloso xenos le ha robado.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha acorralado a Trazyn el Infinito. Es hora de recuperar lo que el orgulloso xenos le ha robado.

languages.text: フリー・トレーダーが "計り知れない "スラジンに追いついた。誇り高き異星人が盗んだものを返す時が来た。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader has caught up with Thrazin the Incalculable. It's time to return what the proud xenos has stolen.

languages.text: Hür Tacir, nihayet Mutlak Trazyn'i köşeye sıkıştırdı. Şimdi kibirli zenonun çaldığı şeyleri geri alma zamanı.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir, nihayet Mutlak Trazyn'i köşeye sıkıştırdı. Şimdi kibirli zenonun çaldığı şeyleri geri alma zamanı.
